channel.title: 2026-05-05 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-05-05 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Diagnosing Chaos with Projected Ensembles of Process Tensors
item.description:
📚 PRX Quantum
👤 Peter O’Donovan, Neil Dowling, Kavan Modi, and Mark T. Mitchison
Author(s): Peter O’Donovan, Neil Dowling, Kavan Modi, and Mark T. Mitchison An approach to probing quantum chaos by repeated interventions is shown to unify techniques for the study and simulation of many-body quantum dynamics. [PRX Quantum 7, 020322] Published Tue May 05, 2026
